lessons: D3 deferred: did not build or modify scripts/financial_parser.py this cycle. The Hebrew-English glossary script remains as-is; no new script work was scoped.

Correctness deviation: edit list asked to cite 'IFRS 17 from 2023' but the ifrs.org Israel jurisdiction profile states first-time IFRS 17 implementation in Israel was postponed by the Insurance Commissioner to 1 January 2025 (2023 was the original global effective date). Body and references updated to 2025 to avoid shipping a verified-false claim; evidence claim ifrs17-2025-israel documents this.

Correctness deviation: edit list framed Companies Law Sec. 172 as 'audit-committee review', but the nevo Companies Law 5759-1999 text shows Sec. 172 governs financial statements of a company that is NOT a reporting corporation, while the financial-statements review committee sits under Sec. 171 + the Companies Regulations (Approving Financial Statements) 2010. Softened the existing Sec. 172 prose in both languages to match verified text rather than preserve the inaccurate gloss.
D2 resolved: tase-mcp is live at agentskills.co.il/he/mcp/tase-mcp ('שרת MCP לבורסה לני"ע בת"א'), so the hard link was kept.
Verified quarterly deadline is exactly 60 days ('תוך שישים ימים מסוף הרבעון', Reg. 39), consistent with the prior 'about 2 months' wording; tightened to '60 days (about 2 months)'.

Panel fix cycle (stay 1.2.0): CRITICAL auditor-opinion taxonomy corrected to four ICPAS grades (unqualified 700; qualified/adverse/disclaimer 705) and going-concern reclassified as emphasis-of-matter (706/570) that does NOT modify the opinion; added ISA 701 KAM. MAJOR small-corp relief expanded to the full Reg. 5d bundle (ISOX exemption, 20% vs 10% valuation materiality, market-risk relief, ~NIS 300M cap). MINORs: Reg. 7(a) AGM/auditor 14-day/3-day nuance, named the BOI Supervisor of Banks 'Public Reporting Directives', added statement of changes in equity to Part C.

Anti-fabrication correction during panel fix: the BOI Public Reporting Directives are NOT simply 'an adaptation of IFRS' (the pre-existing skill framing). Verified they draw primarily on US bank-reporting rules (FASB/US bank supervisors/SEC) and incorporate IFRS for certain topics. Softened the bank framing in both languages and the references file, and fixed the evidence snippet to match.

Judge item 4 (iXBRL) softened: verified ISA iXBRL filing is currently VOLUNTARY (encouraged ahead of a future legislative amendment; only a ~50-datapoint XBRL set is downloadable from MAGNA today). Replaced the prior 'ISA mandates ... phased rollout (large issuers first)' claim, which the sources did not support.

Reviewer-added references/domain-checklist.md had em dashes and placeholder/elided URLs (ifrs.org with an elided path segment); converted all em dashes to commas and replaced elided URLs with their real full URLs so the evidence gate could back them. Added host-level + Hebrew-regulation (takana 5/7/9) evidence rows for the checklist's citations.

Grounding fix cycle (stay 1.2.0): re-cited small-corp-relief-bundle from the GT ---72014 page to the sibling ---62014 page where the verbatim snippets (20% vs 10% materiality, internal-control cancellation, market-risk exemption, <300M) actually appear. Corrected the small-corp index criterion in both SKILL files and the checklist from the wrong 'TA-125' to the regulation's 'TA-100 or TA-Beyond-50' (Reg. 5d). Scoped the ixbrl-voluntary evidence snippet to what the Feb-2023 ISA PDF supports, and added a separate ixbrl-magna-50-datapoints row sourced to Yael Group for the ~50-item MAGNA download.

Zero fact drift since 2026-06-04: iXBRL still VOLUNTARY (ISA reissued the voluntary call-to-join Dec 2025; mandatory awaits an un-enacted amendment), IFRS 17 first-time 2025, small-corp NIS 300M + TA-100/TA-Beyond-50, deadlines (3mo/60-day/Reg 7a), ICPAS 700/701/705/706/570, Companies Law sections, and all reference URLs re-verified.

CRITICAL (expert): skill hardcoded 'shekels' / 'normalize to NIS millions' in the examples, but many TASE issuers (ZIM, Tower, Nova, Camtek, Sapiens) present in USD under IFRS. Added a 'check the reporting currency first' note and de-hardcoded both examples. This was a pre-existing wrong-number hole the drift check would have missed.

Added reviewed-vs-audited (interim = limited-assurance review, not audit), CEO/CFO management certifications in Part D (with the precision that an ISOX-exempt small corp files a REDUCED cert, not none), and an ESG/sustainability note (voluntary ISA framework).

MAJORs applied: consolidated-vs-separate/solo (default to consolidated, solo misstates a holding company); restated/reclassified comparatives warning before YoY; auditor's separate ICFR-effectiveness opinion for large issuers.
Deferred MAJOR (next cycle): watch note on the ISA disclosure-reform interim report (29 Dec 2025, comment period to 12 Feb 2026) once enacted/cleanly sourceable.

Deferred MINOR: update the glossary + financial_parser.py with the new emphasis terms (סקירה, הצהרות מנהלים, מאוחד/נפרד, מטבע הצגה/פעילות, ESG); add a non-GAAP/adjusted-figures analyst warning; Companies Law 267A remuneration-policy detail; gov.il corporations legacy slug corporations_authority -> israeli_corporations_authority.
